notes: 1223 total sites globally as of 2024; 168 countries have at least one site; UK and Mexico tied at ranks 7–8; US and Japan tied at ranks 11–12; Portugal Poland Czechia tied at ranks 18–20

universe_description: All publicly traded companies with market cap above $500 billion USD

universe_description: All brands in the Interbrand Best Global Brands 2023 Top 100

title: Countries by Nominal GDP
prompt: Which country has the largest economy by nominal GDP?
universe_description: All sovereign nations (~195 countries)
notes: IMF April 2024 WEO estimates for 2024; Germany surpassed Japan in 2023 to become 3rd largest economy

universe_description: All airports with 50 million or more annual passengers

ranking_source_name: Forbes World's 50 Most Valuable Sports Teams 2024
universe_source_name: Forbes World's 50 Most Valuable Sports Teams 2024

ranking_source_name: S&P Global Market Intelligence World's 100 Largest Banks 2023
universe_description: All banks with $1 trillion or more in total assets
notes: S&P Global 2023 report uses December 31 2022 asset figures; Chinese banks hold 4 of top 4 spots

title: Countries with Most Fortune Global 500 Companies
prompt: Which country has the most companies on the Fortune Global 500 list?
universe_description: All countries with at least 1 Fortune Global 500 company (35 countries/territories)
notes: Fortune Global 500 published August 5 2024; USA overtook China for the first time since 2018; China count reflects mainland China only (some sources use Greater China which adds HK and Taiwan)

title: Most Profitable Companies by Net Income
prompt: Which company earned the highest net income globally?
universe_description: All companies with $20 billion or more in annual net income
notes: Based on fiscal year 2023 reported net income; Saudi Aramco's $121.3B was for calendar year 2023

title: Richest People in the World
prompt: Who is the wealthiest person in the world according to Forbes?
universe_description: All individuals with net worth $30 billion or more
notes: Forbes annual list published April 2 2024; values calculated using March 8 2024 stock prices and exchange rates; rankings shift frequently

title: Most Spoken Languages by Number of Native Speakers
prompt: Name the 10 languages with the most native (first-language) speakers worldwide.
universe_description: All languages with an estimated 50M or more native speakers
notes: Canonical name is Mandarin Chinese (not just Chinese) to distinguish from Yue/Wu/etc. Rankings vary by source; Ethnologue 27th ed is primary reference. Hindi counts exclude Urdu speakers. Estimates are approximate and disputed.

title: Countries with Most Nobel Prize Winners (All Categories Through 2023)
prompt: Name the 10 countries with the most Nobel Prize winners across all six categories through the 2023 prizes.
metric_desc: Number of Nobel laureates (by citizenship or primary affiliation at time of award)
universe_description: All countries with at least one Nobel Prize laureate from 1901 to 2023
notes: Counts vary by methodology; dual-nationality laureates may be attributed to multiple countries by different sources. Figures here follow primary citizenship or affiliation at time of award. Russia includes Soviet-era prizes.

title: Most Translated Books of All Time
prompt: Name the 10 books or texts with the greatest number of verified translations into distinct languages.
ranking_source_name: Wikipedia: List of literary works by number of translations
universe_description: All books or texts translated into 50 or more languages
notes: The Bible is in a category apart from secular books; ranks 2-5 are secular works. Translation counts vary by source and definition of distinct language vs. dialect. Little Prince and Pinocchio counts include dialect editions in some sources.

title: World Religions by Number of Followers
prompt: Name the 10 largest world religions by estimated number of followers worldwide.
ranking_source_name: Pew Research Center: The World's Religious Groups 2010-2020
universe_description: All major world religions with 5M or more estimated followers
notes: Rankings exclude religiously unaffiliated (~1.19B) which would rank 4th if included. Buddhism figure is from Pew 2020 revised methodology (324M); some earlier sources report ~487M. Folk religions aggregate many traditions.

title: Longest-Reigning Monarchs in Verified History
prompt: Name the 10 monarchs who held their throne for the greatest number of verified years.
universe_description: All monarchs with verified reigns of 50 or more years, based on documented historical or epigraphic records
notes: Verified excludes ancient/mythological claims (e.g., Egyptian kings said to reign 100+ years). Sobhuza II's count includes regency period from birth (1899); some sources start from 1921 when grandmother ceded control (61 years). K'inich Janaab Pakal's dates are attested by Maya inscriptions.

title: Deadliest Wars in History by Estimated Total Deaths
prompt: Name the 10 wars or military conflicts in history with the highest estimated total deaths, including military and civilian casualties.
ranking_source_name: Wikipedia: List of wars by death toll
universe_source_name: Wikipedia: List of wars by death toll
universe_description: All wars or conflicts with at least 1 million estimated deaths
notes: Death tolls are estimates with wide uncertainty; figures derive from historical demography not direct counts. The Second Sino-Japanese War (1937-1945) is counted within WWII totals by many sources. Three Kingdoms estimate is based on recorded population decline. Estimates vary significantly by source.

title: Most Visited Art Museums by Annual Attendance
prompt: Name the 10 art museums or galleries with the highest annual visitor attendance in 2023.
ranking_source_name: The Art Newspaper: Annual Museum Attendance Survey 2023
universe_description: All art museums or galleries with 2 million or more annual visitors
notes: 2023 data; many museums were still recovering to pre-pandemic levels. Louvre 2023 attendance (~8.9M) was below its 2019 record (~9.6M). Attendance at Chinese institutions may use different counting methodology.

title: Wine-Producing Countries by Annual Output
prompt: Name the 10 countries that produce the most wine by volume each year (2022 data).
metric_desc: Annual wine production in million hectoliters (Mhl)
ranking_source_name: OIV (International Organisation of Vine and Wine) 2022 Report
universe_description: All countries producing 1 million or more hectoliters of wine annually
notes: 2022 OIV data published April 2023. Italy led for the third consecutive year. Top 3 (Italy, France, Spain) account for ~51% of global production. Total global production in 2022: ~259.9 Mhl.

title: Countries with Highest Coffee Consumption Per Capita
prompt: Name the 10 countries with the highest annual coffee consumption per person, in kilograms.
universe_description: All countries with 3 or more kg per person per year coffee consumption
notes: Nordic countries dominate per-capita rankings. Numbers vary slightly by source and year. Luxembourg sometimes ranks higher due to cross-border commuter workers inflating per-capita figures. Figures approximate; ICO publishes annual disappearance data by country.

title: Countries with Highest Life Expectancy at Birth
prompt: Name the 10 countries or territories with the highest average life expectancy at birth (most recent available data).
metric_desc: Life expectancy at birth in years (both sexes combined)
ranking_source_name: World Bank World Development Indicators / Worldometer
universe_description: All countries and territories with a life expectancy above 80 years at birth
notes: Rankings and exact values vary slightly between WHO, World Bank, and UN sources. Monaco and other microstates top rankings but have small sample sizes. Data are 2023 estimates or most recently published values. Hong Kong figures are for the SAR separately from mainland China.

title: Largest Living Animals by Maximum Body Weight
prompt: Rank these species by their maximum recorded adult body weight, from heaviest to lightest.
metric_desc: Maximum recorded body weight in kg
universe_description: All species with adults regularly exceeding 1,000 kg in body weight
notes: Marine species dominate top 9; African elephant is the largest land animal at rank 10

title: Fastest Land Animals by Recorded Top Speed
prompt: Rank these land animals by their confirmed maximum recorded speed, from fastest to slowest.
metric_desc: Maximum confirmed top speed in km/h
universe_description: All land animals with confirmed top speeds above 50 km/h
notes: Strictly terrestrial locomotion only; cheetah 104–120 km/h depending on measurement source

title: Deepest Lakes in the World by Maximum Depth
prompt: Rank these lakes by their maximum measured depth, from deepest to shallowest.
ranking_source_name: Wikipedia: List of lakes by depth
universe_source_name: Wikipedia: List of lakes by depth
universe_description: All lakes with confirmed maximum depth exceeding 400 m
notes: Lake Vostok is subglacial; Caspian Sea classified as a lake; distinct from B051 (surface area board)

title: Largest Natural Moons in Our Solar System by Diameter
prompt: Rank these moons by their mean diameter, from largest to smallest.
ranking_source_name: Wikipedia: List of Solar System objects by size
universe_description: All known natural satellites with mean diameter exceeding 200 km
notes: Ganymede is larger than planet Mercury; Charon is moon of dwarf planet Pluto

title: Most Powerful Earthquakes Ever Recorded by Moment Magnitude

universe_description: All recorded earthquakes with moment magnitude 8.5 or greater since reliable seismographic records began c.1900
notes: Moment magnitude scale; reliable global seismographic network established early 1900s

metric_desc: Maximum verified specimen height in meters
universe_description: All tree species with any verified individual specimen exceeding 80 m in height
notes: Ranked by species record; named individual specimens noted; heights by laser rangefinder or tape drop

notes: Active = erupted during Holocene (last ~10,000 years); USA count includes Alaska and Hawaii

title: Deepest Named Points in Earth's Oceans
prompt: Rank these named ocean deep points by their maximum measured depth, from deepest to shallowest.

universe_description: All named ocean deep points or trench maxima with measured depth exceeding 8,000 m
notes: Depths vary by measurement method and year; Challenger Deep most precisely measured at 10,935 ± 6 m

title: Most Followed Twitter/X Accounts (Mid-2024)
prompt: Name the 10 most followed accounts on X (formerly Twitter), as of mid-2024.
universe_description: All X accounts with 80M+ followers
notes: Follower counts shift frequently; figures are approximate mid-2024 snapshots. Elon Musk grew dramatically after acquiring the platform in 2022. Trump account reinstated Nov 2022.

title: Most Visited Websites Worldwide (2024)
prompt: Name the 10 most visited websites in the world by estimated monthly visits, as of 2024.
universe_description: All websites with 2B+ monthly visits
notes: Traffic rankings fluctuate month to month. App-only traffic is excluded from Similarweb web counts. ChatGPT.com rose dramatically during 2024 and entered the top 10 by late 2024.

title: Most Used Social Media Platforms by Monthly Active Users (2024)

universe_description: All social or messaging platforms with 500M+ monthly active users
notes: Includes messaging apps (WhatsApp, WeChat, Telegram). Chinese platforms may be undercounted in global surveys. TikTok figure combines international TikTok + Chinese Douyin.

title: Countries with the Most Internet Users (2024)
prompt: Name the 10 countries with the most total internet users, as of 2024.
universe_description: All sovereign countries (~195)
notes: ITU estimates 5.5 billion global internet users in 2024 (68% of world population). Counts individuals who used the internet in the preceding 3 months.

title: Most Popular Programming Languages — TIOBE Index (Aug 2024)
prompt: Name the top 10 programming languages on the TIOBE Index, as of August 2024.
metric_desc: TIOBE rating (% share of web search queries referencing the language)
universe_description: Top 25 programming languages tracked by TIOBE Index
notes: TIOBE measures popularity via search engine hits, not actual usage. Rankings shift monthly. Python won TIOBE Language of the Year for 2024 with a 9.3% rating gain.

title: Best-Selling Smartphone Brands by Global Market Share (Full-Year 2023)
prompt: Name the top 10 smartphone brands by global units shipped for full-year 2023.
metric_desc: Global market share % (units shipped; IDC full-year 2023)
universe_description: All smartphone brands with 1%+ global market share
notes: Apple ranked #1 by units for the first time in a full calendar year; Samsung had led since 2010. Total market ~1.17B units shipped, down 3.2% YoY.

title: Countries with Fastest Fixed Broadband Download Speeds (Ookla 2023)
prompt: Name the top 10 countries with the fastest median fixed broadband download speeds, per Ookla Speedtest Global Index (Q4 2023).
metric_desc: Median fixed broadband download speed (Mbps; Ookla Speedtest)
universe_description: All countries with median fixed broadband download speed above 50 Mbps
notes: Rankings based on median download speed across all tests in the period. Rankings shift monthly. Singapore and Chile consistently led in 2023; US was cited as 6th fastest in mid-2023 Ookla data. Figures are approximate.

title: Countries Producing the Most Beer (Annual Volume 2023)
prompt: Name the top 10 beer-producing countries in the world by annual production volume (hectoliters), as of 2023.
universe_description: All countries producing 5M+ hectoliters of beer annually
notes: China has led global beer production for 20+ consecutive years. Total global production ~1.884B hl in 2023, down 0.9% YoY. Russia figure is estimated; exact 2023 BarthHaas data not publicly available in full.

title: Countries with the Most Michelin-Starred Restaurants (2024)
prompt: Name the top 10 countries with the most total Michelin-starred restaurants (1-, 2-, and 3-star combined), as of 2024.
metric_desc: Total Michelin-starred restaurants (1+2+3 star combined; per available Michelin Guide editions)
universe_description: All countries with at least 10 Michelin-starred restaurants
notes: Michelin does not cover all countries equally. France guide covers the whole country; US guide covers only selected cities (NYC, Chicago, California, DC, Miami, Atlanta, etc.). Tokyo is the world's most starred city.

title: Most Subscribed YouTube Channels (Mid-2024)
prompt: Name the top 10 most subscribed YouTube channels, as of mid-2024 (approximately July 2024).
universe_description: All YouTube channels with 100M+ subscribers
notes: MrBeast overtook T-Series as the #1 most subscribed channel in June 2024. Subscriber counts shift rapidly; figures are approximate. Many top channels are children's content or Indian entertainment.
